anonymous inference

Chat

— credits

▸

Ask anything, anonymously.

Your prompt is sealed end-to-end and routed so no single hop ever sees both who you are and what you asked.

No credits yet. Fund your account to start chatting — copy your account id from Status and ask your operator to grant credits, then acquire tokens in Settings.

earn credits by serving

Contribute compute

stopped

Start serving just works. If you already run Ollama, LM Studio, or a llama.cpp server, Lluma detects and uses it. If nothing is running, Lluma can set up Ollama for you — start the server and download a small model automatically (with your OK the first time).

Works behind home NAT — your device holds a secure outbound tunnel to the network, so no public IP or port-forwarding is needed. Contribution earns credits to a separate on-device host identity (kept distinct from your spending account).

Advanced — upstream & ingress

On the official app you serve over the tunnel — no ingress needed.

Setting up…

one-time setup

Set up Ollama to host a model?

No local model server is running. Lluma can install Ollama on this device, start it, and download a small model (qwen2.5:0.5b) so you can serve. It runs locally; you can stop it anytime from this tab.

network & privacy

no account yet

Contributing compute

tunnel
—model
—upstream
0served
0earned

why this is private

No single hop ever holds both who you are and what you asked. That is the whole design.

  1. Youhold identity + prompt
  2. Relaysees your IP — but only ciphertext
  3. Gatewayunwraps transport — never your IP
  4. Brokerspends a blind token — no identity
  5. Hostreads the prompt — never your IP

endpoints & account

Settings

Network

checking…

Advanced — set endpoints manually

Until the network ships a signed bootstrap, the gateway key-config and registry pubkey are entered by hand. Get them from your operator (journalctl -u lluma-gateway | grep key_config). Fetching them from the relay is not safe by default — a relay you route through could hand you a key it controls and read your prompts.

Account

no account

Create a new anonymous account or import a 12-word recovery phrase. Everything is sealed on this device with your passphrase.

Account is locked. Enter your passphrase to unlock.

Starter credits New here? Claim a one-time batch of free trial credits — no operator needed. Then acquire tokens below to spend them.

write this down

Your recovery phrase

These 12 words restore your account and credits. Anyone with them controls your account. Store them offline — they are shown only now.
